case_title: QUICKCLICK LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC VS. VIRGINIA DUWE

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUICKCLICK LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUWE, VIRGINIA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-23-2015
